DC Recording and Summary (from Projects):
Zac Webster - Additional Proj Coordinator - December 03

VIEW RECORDING - 18 mins (No highlights)
Meeting Purpose
Define the scope and process for hiring two new Project Coordinators (PCs).
Key Takeaways
- Hiring two full-time PCs at $11/hr to handle contracts, compliance, and invoicing.
- Creating a new, chronological SOP for the PC role to replace the current, non-linear document, enabling faster onboarding.
- Approved a $1,500 setup fee, a $1,000 discount off the standard $2,500, reflecting the existing SOP foundation.
- Adopting a team-based model where each PC owns all tasks for their assigned projects, simplifying communication for PMs.
Topics
New Hire Requirements
- Need: Two full-time Project Coordinators (PCs).
- Goal: Replicate the success of current PC, JC.
    - Core Responsibilities:Draft and manage contracts
    - Handle compliance paperwork
    - Process invoicing (data entry, contact verification, invite to bill)
New SOP Development
- Problem: The current SOP is non-linear and sectionalized, making it inefficient for training new hires.
- Solution: Create a dedicated, chronological SOP for the PC role.
- Process: Julie will provide a high-level workflow email → Scale Virtually will draft the SOP → A process engineering call will finalize it.
- Rationale: The current SOP links to Procore's generic help docs, not MEC's specific workflows, making a custom document essential.
Pricing & Logistics
    - Setup Fee: $1,500 (a $1,000 discount from the standard $2,500).Rationale: The existing SOP provides a strong foundation, reducing Scale Virtually's development work.
- Hourly Rate: $11/hr per PC.
- Training: Scale Virtually will train the new PCs. MEC can also include existing VAs in the training.
PC Team Structure
- Decision: Adopt a team-based model where each PC owns all tasks for their assigned projects.
- Rationale: Simplifies communication for MEC's Project Managers (PMs), who will have one dedicated PC per project.
- Future State: This structure will free up Max to take on a role similar to JC's, expanding the team's capacity.
Next Steps
- Julie: Email a high-level, chronological workflow for the PC role to Scale Virtually by tomorrow morning.
- Deness: Send the addendum to MEC to confirm the two new PC roles and the $1,500 setup fee.
    - Scale Virtually:Book a process engineering call with MEC upon receiving the workflow email and signed addendum.
    - Begin sourcing candidates for the two PC roles.
Action Items
- Email Denesse PC role bullets (award→invoicing) by Dec 4; then Scale Virtually draft PC SOP - WATCH (5 secs)
- Email addendum to Julie/Zac re: 2 PCs; request signature; then Scale Virtually schedule process engineering call - WATCH (5 secs)
Other Notes (from Projects):
• Tools to be referenced only as mentioned: 
  • Procore 
  • Sage Intacct 
  • ERP (as referenced in commitments workflow)
Proposed Solutions (from Projects):
• Clean and standardized Procore project setup across all assigned projects 
• Consistent document structure and completeness at project start 
• Smooth coordination between Project Coordinators, Precon, Accounting, and subcontractors 
• Reduced administrative burden on internal Project Coordinators
Pain Points (from Projects):
• Project Coordinators handling repetitive administrative setup tasks 
• Risk of inconsistency in Procore project setup and file structure 
• Time-intensive coordination across Procore, ERP, and accounting teams 
• Need to ensure projects are fully and correctly set up before financial and billing workflows begin
Tasks (from Projects):
- Project setup in Procore once project is assigned
- Set up project team and initial directory in Procore
- Upload and organize required documents in Procore, including:
    -  Permit (if issued)
    -  Notice of Commencement (NOC), if received
    -  Plans
    -  Correct file structure
- Notify Preconstruction Admin / Manager when project is ready for budget and SOV syncing from Intacct
- Notify Project Accountant (PA) that project has been created
- Create commitments and SOVs
- Send commitments to subcontractors and vendors and push to ERP
- Create billing periods in Procore
- Invite subcontractors to submit billing
- 
- **For detailed work flow, please refer to the attached file.
